footer.tagline: Handcrafted fragrances for the quietly discerning. Each bottle, a story.

p-001.name: Oud Noir
p-001.shortDescription: A dark, resinous oud anchored by smoked leather and amber.
p-001.longDescription: Oud Noir opens with a commanding presence of dark Arabian oud, gradually revealing a heart of smoked leather and vetiver before settling into a warm amber and musk base. A fragrance of authority and quiet intensity — made for those who leave a room without raising their voice.

p-002.name: Rose de Minuit
p-002.shortDescription: Midnight rose petals wrapped in velvet musk and dark patchouli.
p-002.longDescription: Rose de Minuit is a nocturnal rose — far removed from the sun-drenched florals of the day. Dew-kissed rose petals bloom over a shadowed heart of saffron and iris, settling into a base of dark patchouli, sandalwood, and warm musk. Seductive and deeply feminine.

p-003.name: Ambre Doré
p-003.shortDescription: Warm golden amber fused with vanilla absolute and cedarwood.
p-003.longDescription: Ambre Doré is the scent of last light. Rich Omani amber blends seamlessly with bourbon vanilla absolute and the dry warmth of Atlas cedarwood, leaving a trail that lingers long after you've left the room. Comforting, luxurious, and timeless — suitable for any season.

p-004.name: Jasmin Étoilé
p-004.shortDescription: Indolic jasmine sambac with bergamot and white musk.
p-004.longDescription: Jasmin Étoilé captures the intoxicating intensity of jasmine sambac in full bloom under a starlit sky. A radiant bergamot opening gives way to the heady floral heart, before white musk and blonde woods soften it into an intimate, skin-close finish. Luminous and unforgettable.

p-005.name: Cèdre Blanc
p-005.shortDescription: Crisp white cedar with green cardamom and cool vetiver.
p-005.longDescription: Cèdre Blanc is a study in clean masculinity. It opens with a snap of green cardamom and lemon zest, pivoting to a cool, clean cedarwood heart that is fresh yet substantial. Vetiver and white musks carry it to a near-transparent dry-down — effortlessly refined.

p-006.name: Vétiver Impérial
p-006.shortDescription: Haitian vetiver with aged rum accord and dark tobacco leaf.
p-006.longDescription: Vétiver Impérial is not for the faint-hearted. Haitian vetiver — raw, smoky, and deeply rooted — is elevated by an aged rum accord and a whisper of dark tobacco leaf. The base reveals a complex sandalwood and labdanum that adds gravitas and warmth. Bold, lasting, and unmistakably masculine.

p-007.name: Iris Sauvage
p-007.shortDescription: Powdery Florentine iris root with violet leaf and cool woods.
p-007.longDescription: Iris Sauvage begins with the unmistakable cool, powdery signature of Florentine iris root — carrot-like, crystalline, and rare. Violet leaf adds a fleeting green freshness, while blonde sandalwood and ambrette seed round the composition into something deeply wearable and sophisticated.

p-008.name: Musc Sacré
p-008.shortDescription: A skin-scent musk layered with orris, ambrette, and cashmere.
p-008.longDescription: Musc Sacré is a meditation on skin. Transparent and intimate, it layers the softest white musk with orris butter, ambrette seed, and a whisper of cashmere wood. It smells like nothing else and yet like everything familiar — the perfect base for layering or a complete statement worn alone.

p-009.name: Bergamote Royale
p-009.shortDescription: Bergamot and neroli brightened by pink pepper and oakmoss.
p-009.longDescription: Bergamote Royale is a citrus chypre for the modern gentleman. Calabrian bergamot and neroli open with effortless brightness, grounded by pink pepper and a classical oakmoss and vetiver base. Crisp for the morning, sophisticated for the afternoon — an impeccable everyday signature.

p-010.name: Fleur de Nuit
p-010.shortDescription: Tuberose and orange blossom over a base of black vanilla.
p-010.longDescription: Fleur de Nuit is an ode to nocturnal blooming. Tuberose — creamy, narcotic, magnificent — is paired with orange blossom absolute and a touch of ylang ylang. The base of black vanilla, labdanum, and soft musks anchors the composition, giving it an addictive sweetness that stops just short of excess.

p-011.name: Encens Précieux
p-011.shortDescription: Sacred frankincense with myrrh, cistus, and smoky guaiac wood.
p-011.longDescription: Encens Précieux takes frankincense as its sacred starting point — resinous, luminous, and ancient. Ethiopian olibanum gives way to a heart of myrrh and cistus, their balsamic warmth deepened by guaiac wood smoke. This is a fragrance with ceremony — meditative, unhurried, and profoundly beautiful.

p-012.name: Santal Doré
p-012.shortDescription: Mysore sandalwood warmed by golden amber and soft spices.
p-012.longDescription: Santal Doré pays homage to the legendary sandalwood of Mysore — creamy, warm, and quietly opulent. A top note of cardamom and soft pink pepper eases you in, revealing a pure sandalwood heart that is then draped in golden amber and a whisper of benzoin. Rich without heaviness — a fragrance of quiet confidence.

about.heroHeading: A Fragrance House Born from Obsession
about.heroSubheading: From a small atelier in Paris to an international house of rare scents — Maison Aurel is the story of a relentless pursuit of olfactory beauty.
about.storyBody1: Maison Aurel was founded in 2018 by perfumer Aurélien Marchand, a graduate of Grasse's storied perfumery schools, who had grown disillusioned with mass-market fragrances that prioritized longevity over artistry. Working from a rented studio off Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré, he began composing small-batch perfumes using raw materials sourced directly from growers — Bulgarian rose absolute, Haitian vetiver, Omani frankincense.
about.storyBody2: Within three years, Maison Aurel had developed a following amongst collectors and tastemakers who valued restraint over spectacle. Each fragrance is composed in-house, never outsourced to a laboratory, and produced in strictly limited quantities. We believe scent is personal memory — and we treat each bottle with that gravity.
about.ingredientsSubheading: Every Maison Aurel fragrance begins with the ingredient. We travel to the source.
about.ing1Desc: Our oud is sourced from sustainable agarwood plantations in Assam and wild-harvested estates in the Arabian Peninsula. Dense, dark, and intoxicating — it forms the soul of our masculine compositions.
about.ing2Desc: Harvested at dawn in June from the Valley of Roses. A single kilogram of rose absolute requires over three tonnes of petals. We use only steam-distilled absolute — never synthetic reconstructions.
about.ing3Desc: Our amber accord is built on Omani frankincense tears and Laotian benzoin resin. Warm, golden, and ancient — these resins form the foundation of our most enduring base notes.
about.sustainabilitySubheading: Luxury and responsibility are not in opposition. We are committed to both.
about.sus1Desc: We work only with suppliers who can demonstrate fair wages, no child labor, and sustainable harvesting practices. All contracts are reviewed annually.
about.sus2Desc: Our bottles are designed to be refilled. All outer packaging is made from FSC-certified recycled card, printed with vegetable-based inks, and entirely plastic-free.
about.sus3Desc: We have committed to offsetting 100% of our production and shipping emissions by end of 2026, through verified reforestation projects in partnership with One Tree Planted.

contact.heroHeading: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.heroSubheading: Whether you have a question about a fragrance, need help with an order, or simply want to talk perfumery — we're here.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. We'll reply within 48 hours.
contact.faq1A: Yes — we ship to over 80 countries via DHL Express. Orders over $200 qualify for complimentary shipping. Duties and taxes may apply depending on your destination.
contact.faq2A: We accept returns within 14 days if the bottle is unopened and in original packaging. To initiate a return, email us at returns@maisonaurel.com with your order number.
contact.faq3A: Yes. We offer a Discovery Set of 8 × 2ml vials for $35, which includes a $35 credit toward any full bottle. Select fragrances are also available as 10ml travel sizes.
contact.faq4Q: Are your fragrances suitable for sensitive skin?
contact.faq4A: All Maison Aurel fragrances comply with IFRA standards and are tested for skin safety. If you have known sensitivities to specific materials (e.g. oakmoss, musks), please consult the ingredient list on each product page.
contact.faq5Q: Do you offer bespoke or corporate gifting?
contact.faq5A: We offer bespoke engraving on select bottles and curated gift sets for corporate clients. Contact us directly at gifts@maisonaurel.com for minimum quantities and lead times.
contact.storesSubheading: Experience Maison Aurel in person at one of our flagship locations.
contact.store1Address: 6 Rue de la Paix, 75002 Paris, France
contact.store2Address: Gate Village, Building 3, DIFC, Dubai, UAE
contact.store3Address: 812 Madison Avenue, New York, NY 10065, USA
